title: Rei has lilliths soul How
wikitext:
[]: Rei has lilliths soul? How?             Quote Post by Perfectblue » Thu Aug 12, 2010 8:52 pm I dont recall if the series explicitly states, but Rei has lilliths soul, how does this happen. Also is the reason Rei can pilot Unit 01 is due to the idea she is partially created by Yui Ikari, thus having some of her soul, since Yui is trapped within Unit 01 albeit by choice apparently. I still dont really understand the difference between Adam an Lillith.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Aug 12, 2010 9:07 pm http://wiki.evageeks.org/Classified_Information_%28Translation%29#Yui_Ikari and http://wiki.evageeks.org/Classified_Information_%28Translation%29#The_Second_Angel Hope this helps as a start.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Aug 12, 2010 10:38 pm There was a lot of discussion about this really recently too... anyone have a thread link?

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Fri Aug 13, 2010 1:08 am I'm not sure if these recent threads cover the Lilith aspect of the question, still they are about Rei's origins and might provide useful supplementary info: Rei's Genetic Lineage... er, Origins (Again) The Mother, Rei, and Psychoanalysis in NGE [Split]

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Aug 13, 2010 8:07 am I am going to sum it up really quickly: Rei was born out of a failed extraction experiment to retrieve Yui from Unit-01. Somehow she had Yui's genetic traits, and a large portion Lilith's soul (Unit-01 is a clone of Lilith, so this somehow makes sense). Souls are able to be split, divided, hacked in any which way (as also exampled by Kyoko Soryu), and it is believed Rei's portion of Lilith's soul was halved to occupy Unit-00 (the Unit-00 = Half Rei soul is a theory, mind you.) The reason Rei was able to sync with Unit-01 could be that her connection with Yui, but I doubt it. I think it's more along the lines of Rei's connection with Lilith, being that Rei holds a portion of Lilith's soul and Unit-01 is a clone of Lilith. The difference between Adam and Lilith is that Adam, the Seed of Life bearing the Fruit of Life, is the mother of the Angels; Lilith, the Seed of Life bearing the Fruit of Knowledge, is the mother of all mankind, and the rest of the familiar life we see on Earth. Basically, the entire show is a war of the spawn of these two Seeds of Life.

[]:             Quote Post by The Abhorrent » Fri Aug 13, 2010 9:33 am Sachi wrote: Rei was born out of a failed extraction experiment to retrieve Yui from Unit-01. Somehow she had Yui's genetic traits, and a large portion Lilith's soul (Unit-01 is a clone of Lilith, so this somehow makes sense).

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Aug 13, 2010 2:17 pm It concludes that Rei I's soul is the resident soul of Unit 00, and I find little evidence to support that specifically.

[]:             Quote Post by The Abhorrent » Fri Aug 13, 2010 7:22 pm AuraTwilight wrote: What about Shinji seeing "Ayanami" inside Unit 00 when it freaks out on him? I found that pretty damning.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 13, 2010 10:09 pm The Abhorrent wrote: As I said, I'm not denying that (part of) Rei's soul resides in Unit 00. I'm just curious why the article says Rei I, who presumably had no form of contact with the Eva (as that was how Yui and Kyoko were absorbed) prior to being strangled to death by Naoko Akagi.

[]:             Quote Post by The Abhorrent » Fri Aug 13, 2010 11:21 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: We don't have much in the way of specifics of why/how, but there is a "clue" in-series that it is somehow Rei 1: During Rei's experience of Instrumentality she sees a vision of the same wide-eyed "Rei" that Shinji saw in episode 14 when he was in Eva-00. The script for episode 25 specifically identifies this Rei as Rei 1.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Aug 14, 2010 1:08 am No, the numbering of the clones in that scene is clearly an indicator of which generation of Rei Ayanami is which: http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-25/episode-25B-scene5.html Rei 1= child Rei Rei 2 = Rei in the plugsuit Rei 3 = Rei in the school uniform. The Abhorrent wrote: I've made my case on the matter already, and I'll be sticking to it. Not to mention we're starting to veer off-topic here.

[]:             Quote Post by The Abhorrent » Sat Aug 14, 2010 1:42 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: No, the numbering of the clones in that scene is clearly an indicator of which generation of Rei Ayanami is which: http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-25/episode-25B-scene5.html Rei 1= child Rei Rei 2 = Rei in the plugsuit Rei 3 = Rei in the school uniform.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sat Aug 14, 2010 4:36 am Rei's soul is Lilith's soul. When we say Rei 1's soul is in unit00, we mean the portion of Lilith's soul that was in Rei 1 is in unit00. also for evidence theres a quote from i think 23' where Rei refers to 'the me inside the eva'

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Aug 14, 2010 4:00 pm Hmm, certainly something to consider. I haven't looked too closely into the supplementary materials to be honest, which is definitely something to look into.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Aug 15, 2010 1:10 pm slothen wrote: Rei's soul is Lilith's soul. When we say Rei 1's soul is in unit00, we mean the portion of Lilith's soul that was in Rei 1 is in unit00. also for evidence theres a quote from i think 23' where Rei refers to 'the me inside the eva'

[]:             Quote Post by The Abhorrent » Sun Aug 15, 2010 2:16 pm Alright, taking some time to re-watch the scene from episode 25, it seems that I noticed an oddity. Using this link again: http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-25/episode-25B-scene5.html Rei 1 -- Predominantly seen as the child Rei, but in cut #158 (and #160, if heavily distorted), she is shown older (14) and in and plug suit. This Rei's role appears to be that of stating the honest truth, even if Rei (as a whole) is uncomfortable with it. Rei 2 -- Always seen in a plug suit, though her role is rather hazy. She mostly speaks of how interactions shape who Rei is, and acknowledges that she cannot die due to the fact Gendo needs her for his plans. Speaks the least if I'm not mistaken. Rei 3 -- First seen in a school uniform, but is also seen in cut #157 in a plug suit. Clearly the decision-making party of the three, and presumably the dominant aspect. The oddity is that both Rei 1 and Rei 3 are eventually seen in a plug suit themselves, which raises the question if Rei 1 is actually the soul of the child Rei or just assuming a child-like form? Was Rei 1 (as seen in the scene above) inside Unit 00? Maybe, she appears to the most foreign entity of the three and could be trying to re-join with the rest of herself (again, this could be due to Rei absorbing the portion of herself that was in the Eva as she set it to self-destruct). The biggest question is could Rei 1 really be the entirety of Rei I who was strangled to death by Naoko Akagi? The only real evidence of this is that Rei 1 sticks to a child-like form for the majority of that scene. An interesting possibility is that during the activation experiment where Rei II was injured absorbed the portion her soul which embodied Rei I, it's entirely possible if nothing more than a fluke. Anyhow, this could be a simple back and forth arguement which relies on hunches and incredibly vague evidence. All we can say for certain is that a part of Rei is in the soul of Unit 00, though which part and when it was absorbed into it is never really established. Like a lot of things, we may never know the full story unless Anno decides to tell us. And a quick tangent question -- Could the origin of the Eva determine how much of an individual's soul is absorbed by said Eva? Unit 01, being the only Lilith-based Eva, is capable of completely absorbing a Lilith-based soul (Yui). Adam-based Evas (Units 00 and 02) absorb only part (half?) of their resident soul (Rei and Kyoko respectively), perhaps due to some partial incompatibility. Meh, something to consider but could be no more than a fun fact. AuraTwilight wrote: Indeed, Lilith contained a whole bunch of souls that she released to start life, so technically yes, that is correct.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Aug 15, 2010 6:06 pm And a quick tangent question -- Could the origin of the Eva determine how much of an individual's soul is absorbed by said Eva? Unit 01, being the only Lilith-based Eva, is capable of completely absorbing a Lilith-based soul (Yui). Adam-based Evas (Units 00 and 02) absorb only part (half?) of their resident soul (Rei and Kyoko respectively), perhaps due to some partial incompatibility. Meh, something to consider but could be no more than a fun fact.

[]:             Quote Post by The Abhorrent » Sun Aug 15, 2010 7:03 pm AuraTwilight wrote: A neat idea, but it's implied that they put the rest of Kyoko's soul in Unit 02 after she commited suicide, and Eva's 03 and onward aren't insinuated to have any sort of incomplete soul within.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Aug 16, 2010 9:14 am The Abhorrent wrote: Unit 04 had an S2 engine, which is another name for an angel's core. It may have came from the 4th(?) angel, Shamshel, and that could serve as the resident soul for the Eva. Maybe the fact it was shattered in combat (killing the angel), it was incomplete and unstable even after being restored. Either way, Unit 04 went boom as a direct result.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Mon Aug 16, 2010 10:47 am ... Pardon me, but now where the heck is the threadstarter?
